characters.name: Damey "Waynehead" Wayne
characters.description: Berserk Button: Really sensitive about his leg brace thanks to his club foot. Push this button and he'll verbally crush you. Beware the Nice Ones: Don't test him, especially if it involves his brace. Nice Guy: He's a friendly boy. Token Good Teammate: Arguably the nicest of the main group.

characters.name: Mo' Money
characters.description: Hustler: His main character trait. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He's a decent friend to the main gang whenever he isn't scamming them. Only Known by Their Nickname: It's unknown if "Mo" is his actual name.

characters.name: Marvin
characters.description: The Leader: Occasionally takes on this role. Vitriolic best buds: With Waynehead.

characters.name: Roz
characters.description: Action Girl: She's the most athletic member of the gang.

characters.name: Toof
characters.description: Sweet Tooth: Like most kids his age, he has a candy obsession. Although it's a bit extreme, even for a ten year old.
